text_template: Support for the show already comes from PipeDrive. You know what can silently kill sales teams? The inability to see what's actually happening in your pipeline. Many businesses are running their sales on a CRM so complicated that half the team won't even log in. That's where PipeDrive comes in, the easy, intelligent CRM loved by growing sales teams. Pipe Drive gives your team one complete record of every customer and deal. So instead of chasing information across disconnected tools and teams, everything you need is right in front of you. Pipe Drive centers around a visual pipeline where you can see every deal what stage it in and exactly what needs to happen next giving you complete clarity on your entire sales process at a glance Pipe Drive is designed to be fast to set up easy to learn and genuinely delightful to use across the full selling cycle It designed to accelerate the work not become work itself You can switch to a CRM built by salespeople for salespeople and join the over 100 companies already using Pipe Drive No credit card or payment needed Just head to pipedrive slash explain to get started in receiving exclusive 30 free instead of the usual 14 trial That's pipedrive.com slash explain and you can be up and running in minutes.
intro_variants: Support for the show already comes from PipeDrive.
outro_variants: That's pipedrive.com slash explain and you can be up and running in minutes.
